  "findings": [
    "Ice barrier missing at roof eaves in a cold climate zone",
    "Non-compliance with IRC R905 underlayment requirements for ice dam protection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove shingles and underlayment along the eave edges to expose the sheathing",
    "Install a self-adhering polymer-modified bitumen sheet ice barrier extending from the eave edge to at least 24 inches inside the exterior wall line",
    "Reinstall underlayment and shingles per manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "In areas where there has been a history of ice forming along the eaves, IRC R905 requires an ice barrier to be installed. Omitting this component in a cold climate creates a high risk of ice damming, water backup, and subsequent structural water damage.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R905.1.2",
    "IRC R905.2.7"
  ]
}
